zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Mytton於大約1440年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德時，他的父親William Mytton26歲，母親Margaret Corbet25歲。他於1464年與Anne Agnes Swynnerton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1500年2月6日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Mytton于大约1440年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德时，他的父亲William Mytton26岁，母亲Margaret Corbet25岁。他于1464年与Anne Agnes Swynnerton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1500年2月6日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mytton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mitton
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of the places in Lancashire, Yorkshire, and the West Midlands, so named in Old English as ‘farmstead at a river confluence’, from (ge)m̄ȳthe ‘river confluence’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Mytton was born about 1440, in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Mytton, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Corbet, was 25. He married Anne Agnes Swynnerton in 1464. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 6 February 1500, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Mytton est né environ 1440, à Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Mytton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Corbet, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Anne Agnes Swynnerton en 1464. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 6 février 1500, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1464 Anne Agnes Swynnerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 6. Februar 1500 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: John de Mytton(이)가 대략 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴 운더 리자르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Mytton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Corbet(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1464년 Anne Agnes Swynnerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1500년 2월 6일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴 운더 리자르드에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Anne Agnes Swynnerton em 1464. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Mytton родился около 1440 г. в местности вестон ундир лизард, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Mytton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Corbet, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Agnes Swynnerton в 1464 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 6 февраля 1500 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности вестон ундир лизард, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Weston upon Trent, Staffordshire, Englan: Weston upon Trent, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Mytton nació aproximadamente 1440, en Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Mytton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Corbet, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Anne Agnes Swynnerton en 1464. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 6 de febrero de 1500, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
